ddls:
CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "naics_code" TEXT /* NAICS code for the industry */,
  "naics_description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "parent_naics_code" TEXT /* NAICS code of the parent industry */,
  "industry_type" TEXT /* Type of industry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the industry record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the industry record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of financial item */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit in which the item is measured */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the item was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_statuses" (
  "tax_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax status */,
  "tax_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the tax status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tax status */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate applicable to the tax status */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date from which the tax status is effective */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the tax status was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the tax status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employer_statuses" (
  "employer_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employer status */,
  "employer_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the employer status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the employer status */,
  "minimum_employees" INTEGER /* Minimum number of employees for the status */,
  "maximum_employees" INTEGER /* Maximum number of employees for the status */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the employer status was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the employer status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employer_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revenue_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revenue data entry */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "tax_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tax status */,
  "employer_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employer status */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue amount */,
  "coefficient_of_variation" REAL /* Coefficient of variation of the revenue */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the revenue data */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the revenue data was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the revenue data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revenue_data_tax_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("tax_status_id") REFERENCES tax_statuses ("tax_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revenue_data_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revenue_data_employer_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("employer_status_id") REFERENCES employer_statuses ("employer_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revenue_data_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing user permissions */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the revenue data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES revenue_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the metadata entry was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the metadata entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_industry_metadata_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the metadata entry was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the metadata entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_metadata_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_status_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "tax_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tax status */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the metadata entry was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the metadata entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_status_metadata_tax_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("tax_status_id") REFERENCES tax_statuses ("tax_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employer_status_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "employer_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employer status */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the metadata entry was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the metadata entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employer_status_metadata_employer_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("employer_status_id") REFERENCES employer_statuses ("employer_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the revenue data */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES revenue_data ("data_id")
)
